gaps.title: Add TraitTimeOfDay for sky-cycle orchestration (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: During Phase 2 refresh of examples/showcase/realistic-forest.refreshed.holo, the scene needed a driver for time-of-day phases (dawn/golden_hour/dusk/dark) to orchestrate: (1) ambient sound crossfades (birdsong->crickets), (2) skybox exposure ramp, (3) fog density/color progression, (4) emissive intensity scaling for bioluminescent objects. No TraitTimeOfDay.ts or equivalent exists. Suggested API: @time_of_day { cycle_duration_minutes: 24, start_phase: 'golden', phases: { dawn: {...}, golden: {...}, dusk: {...}, dark: {...} } } — exposes current_phase and phase_t (0-1) for downstream trait subscriptions (time_envelope in @ambient already references this interface but has nothing to drive it).
